= (x² + 6x) + (4x + 24)        ← distribute again

────────────────────────

FOIL = First • Outside • Inside • Last.

First:  x·x   = x²  
Outside: x·6   = 6x  
Inside:  4·x   = 4x  
Last:    4·6   = 24  

Add them:  x² + 6x + 4x + 24 = x² + 10x + 24

            x + 4  
       ×    x + 6  
     ────────────────  
             6x + 24        ← 6 · (x + 4)

     ────────────────  
           x² + 10x + 24

  (x + 4)(x + 6) = x² + 10x + 24
